phrases.intent_en: Ask what Saint-Servan is known for
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Servan is the quieter, residential area of Saint-Malo, directly adjacent to Intra-Muros. It's known for the ferry port and the aquarium.

responses.phonetic: say tun spay-see-ah-lee-TAY oo oon par-tee-kew-lah-ree-TAY loh-KAL
responses.local: Saint-Servan est connu pour son port ferry et le Grand Aquarium de Saint-Malo, l’un des plus grands de France.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the aquarium near here
phrases.cultural_note: The Grand Aquarium de Saint-Malo is in Saint-Servan, near the ferry terminal. It's one of the largest aquariums in France.

responses.english: Near the ferry terminal. Five minutes walk from the center.
responses.local: L’aquarium se trouve près du terminal ferry, à 5 minutes à pied du centre de Saint-Servan.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the ferry to the Channel Islands
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le terminal ferries pour Jersey et Guernsey ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh tair-mee-NAL feh-REE poor zher-ZEE ay gur-ZEE
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries to Jersey and Guernsey depart from Saint-Malo's ferry terminal in Saint-Servan. The crossing takes 70-90 minutes.

responses.english: At the ferry terminal, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: luh პრო-shan day-PAR eh byan-TOH, ruh-gar-DAY luh pah-NOH
responses.local: Prenez le bus ligne 4 ou 5 depuis la porte Saint-Vincent. Le trajet dure 10 minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the beach at Paramé
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la plage de Paramé ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah PLAZH duh pah-rah-MAY
phrases.cultural_note: The long sandy beach of Paramé stretches east from Saint-Servan. It's popular for windsurfing and walking in all seasons.

responses.english: East of Saint-Servan, following the coast.
responses.local: La plage de Paramé se trouve à l'est de Saint-Servan, en suivant la côte. C'est une longue plage de sable idéale pour la marche ou la planche à voile.

phrases.text_local: Comment aller à Intra-Muros depuis Saint-Servan ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN ah-LAY ah lan-trah-moo-ROHS duh-PWEE san-ser-VAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Servan is directly connected to Intra-Muros via the city walls walk. The walk along the eastern ramparts takes about 10 minutes.

responses.english: Follow the ramparts east. Ten minutes walk.
responses.local: Depuis Saint-Servan, empruntez les remparts vers l'est pour rejoindre Intra-Muros en 10 minutes à pied. Le chemin offre une belle vue sur la mer.
